text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...My first dream of the year was about Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
After performing as well as her in my races, I was
selected as Best Junior Year Umamusume—just
like her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Then we trained together, and I went on to the
Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I had the same dream again... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's a premonition? Maybe I really will
be selected as Best Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Chiyono O. And I apologize for
not being able to watch you at the Asahi Hai F.S.
the other day...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan! Happy New Year! Are you feeling better?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am. Thank you for asking. I'm prepared to
put my all into training, starting today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful to hear! There's so much I want
to talk to you abou—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt... Bzzt...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ack! Th-that's my phone! I'm so sorry about this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Could you have chosen a worse time to call, Big
Bro? I'll call you back later, so—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...That's everyone who received an URA award
this year. The Best Junior Umamusume award
went to a racer who set a record in a junior
1,600-meter race...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
With an incredible 127 votes, there's no doubt
she deserved the honor... But it wasn't me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The comment they left for me says, "She's
definitely strong, but she's missing that special
something to make her stand out"...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh well... I guess I didn't make it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, though. There were still people who
voted for you, were there not?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Yeah, and I'm incredibly thankful for that,
but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I feel like the fact that I'm average has just been
shoved in my face again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm always praised for being a hard worker, and I
usually get threes and fours out of five on my
report cards... which isn't bad.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But that's all I am—"not bad." I never exceed
people's expectations or fall short of them. For
better or worse, I'm just average.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Looking at that Umamusume who got over 120
votes... it kinda hits me that I'll never become a
prodigy like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But even if I'm just average, that doesn't mean I'm
going to give up on my dream!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If my opponent is a prodigy who can win the
lottery after playing once, then I'll simply enter it
a hundred times before she can do so.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe by doing that, I'll be able to win the grand
prize before she gets a chance to try her luck!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Ardan, but please excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To win the Derby, the only thing a mediocre
Umamusume like me can do is not give up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...She's just like me. We're both trying to
overcome who we are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's, but I'm busying myself creating
next week's training schedule. As I work away,
Sakura Chiyono O comes flying through the door.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Can we start training earlier than
planned?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Just tell me what I need to improve on, and I'll
get started right away!
choice_data_list: The ability to predict how a race will develop.

Why don't you try exploring a new side of
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm. Okay! Let's hurry and get ready to go, then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
To observe some races, of course! Um, let's see...
The next high-profile race is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can get a word in edgeways, Sakura
Chiyono O starts making preparations...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And we end up at Kyoto Racecourse to watch a
race.
choice_data_list: You sure know how to make things happen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That just shows you how motivated I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now please concentrate on the race!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Coming up from behind is Tamamo Cross! She's
shot right up to the front in an instant! What
powerful legs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oooh! So that's what an end closer is like! I see!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sakura Chiyono O and I continue to
watch races for quite a while.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Awww... Rest?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll loaf about on the floor, then. Is that all right
with you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well, here I go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sakura Chiyono O curls up on the big
heated rug in my office.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Let's talk about my next race!
choice_data_list: I said you needed to rest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I am resting! I'm lying down and just chatting with
you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please! Just tell me about my next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sudden rebellious attitude notwithstanding,
Sakura Chiyono O relaxes in my office for a while.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Explore a new side of me? In other words...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. I wasn't expecting Miss Goody
Two-Shoes to ask me for help.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Let's see if you can pass my test first. Go ahead
and ask me to make you a real delinquent.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Er, okay. Um... Pl-please make me a real...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Eek! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I frantically stop Sakura Chiyono O before she
goes barreling down the wrong path in life.
